name: secoda-analysis-mcp
description: Explore and analyse your Secoda data catalog with Claude. Search assets, browse lineage, query documentation, and chat with AI personas — read-only access to your full data catalog.

api_token.title: Secoda API Token
api_token.description: Your Secoda API token. Find this in Secoda → Settings → API.

api_url.title: Secoda API URL
api_url.description: Your Secoda API base URL (e.g. https://your-org.secoda.co/api/v1/).

ai_persona_id.title: AI Persona ID (optional)
ai_persona_id.description: UUID of the Secoda AI persona to use for ai_chat queries. Leave blank to skip.

tools.name: search_data_assets
tools.description: Full-text search across all Secoda data assets

tools.name: get_resource
tools.description: Fetch a single resource by ID

tools.name: retrieve_entity
tools.description: Retrieve a Secoda entity with full metadata

tools.name: entity_lineage
tools.description: Upstream/downstream lineage for a data asset

tools.name: list_resources
tools.description: List resources by type (table, column, dashboard, etc.)

tools.name: list_collections
tools.description: List all collections in the catalog

tools.name: get_collection
tools.description: Get a collection with its members

tools.name: list_questions
tools.description: List Q&A questions in the catalog

tools.name: get_question
tools.description: Get a specific question and its answers

tools.name: ai_chat
tools.description: Chat with the Secoda AI persona
